Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ParseException

Packages that use ParseException
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
Parser Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools
Java Object Tools
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util
REST Server Utilities

    Method
    Description
    <T> Optional<T>
    Section.asBean(Class<T> c)
    Shortcut for calling asBean(sectionName, c, false).

    Section.asBean(Class<T> c, boolean ignoreUnknownProperties)

    Entry.asList()
    Returns this entry as a parsed list.

    Entry.asList(Parser parser)
    Returns this entry as a parsed list.
    Optional<JsonMap>
    Entry.asMap()
    Returns this entry as a parsed map.
    Optional<JsonMap>
    Entry.asMap(Parser parser)
    Returns this entry as a parsed map.
    Section
    Section.writeToBean(Object bean, boolean ignoreUnknownProperties)
    Copies the entries in this section to the specified bean by calling the public setters on that bean.

    JsonTokenReader.readNumberValue()

    JsonTokenReader.readSkipWsAndComments()
    Reads the next non-whitespace, non-comment character or -1 at end of stream.
    protected String
    JsonTokenReader.readString()
    Reads a double-quoted JSON string from the current input position.

    JsonTokenReader.readValueStart(int c)

    Method that gets called when an unknown bean property name is encountered.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(Object input, Class<T> type)
    Same as Parser.parse(Object, Type, Type...) except optimized for a non-parameterized class.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(Object input, Type type, Type... args)
    Parses input into the specified object type.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(Object input, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as Parser.parse(Object, Type, Type...) except the type has already been converted into a ClassMeta object.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(String input, Class<T> type)
    Same as Parser.parse(Object, Class) but since it's a String input doesn't throw an IOException.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(String input, Type type, Type... args)
    Same as Parser.parse(Object, Type, Type...) but since it's a String input doesn't throw an IOException.
    final <T> T
    Parser.parse(String input, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as Parser.parse(Object, ClassMeta) but since it's a String input doesn't throw an IOException.
    final <T> T
    ParserSession.parse(Object input, Class<T> type)
    Same as ParserSession.parse(Object, Type, Type...) except optimized for a non-parameterized class.

    ParserSession.parse(Object input, Type type, Type... args)
    Parses input into the specified object type.
    final <T> T
    ParserSession.parse(Object input, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as ParserSession.parse(Object, Type, Type...) except the type has already been converted into a ClassMeta object.
    final <T> T
    ParserSession.parse(String input, Class<T> type)
    Same as ParserSession.parse(Object, Class) but parses from a string and doesn't throw an IOException.
    final <T> T
    ParserSession.parse(String input, Type type, Type... args)
    Same as ParserSession.parse(Object,Type,Type...) but parses from a string and doesn't throw an IOException.
    final <T> T
    ParserSession.parse(String input, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as ParserSession.parse(Object, ClassMeta) except parses from a string and doesn't throw an IOException.
    final Object[]
    Parser.parseArgs(Object input, Type[] argTypes)
    Parses the specified array input with each entry in the object defined by the argTypes argument.

    ParserSession.parseArgs(Object input, Type[] argTypes)
    Parses the specified array input with each entry in the object defined by the argTypes argument.
    final <E> Collection<E>

    Parses the contents of the specified reader and loads the results into the specified collection.

    Parses the contents of the specified reader and loads the results into the specified collection.

  • Uses of ParseException in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream that throw ParseException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    RecordReader.canRead()
    Returns true if RecordReader.read(Class) can be called to produce another record.
    default boolean
    TokenReader.canRead()
    Returns true if TokenReader.read(Class) is currently callable on this cursor — i.e. the cursor is positioned at a value boundary.
    Number
    TokenReader.getNumber()
    Returns the current numeric value as a parsed Number.
    TokenType
    TokenReader.next()
    Advances the cursor to the next token.
    <T> T
    RecordReader.read(Class<T> type)
    Reads and returns the next record bound to the requested type.
    <T> T
    RecordReader.read(Type type, Type... args)
    Same as RecordReader.read(Class) but accepts a parameterized Type and optional type arguments (the same shape as Parser.parse(Object, Type, Type...)).
    <T> T
    RecordReader.read(ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as RecordReader.read(Class) but accepts a pre-resolved ClassMeta.
    default <T> T
    TokenReader.read(Class<T> type)
    Consumes the upcoming value (object, array, or scalar) and binds it to a POJO via the format's existing parser.
    default <T> T
    TokenReader.read(Type type, Type... args)
    Same as TokenReader.read(Class) but accepts a parameterized Type and optional type arguments (the same shape as Parser.parse(Object, Type, Type...)).
    default <T> T
    TokenReader.read(ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as TokenReader.read(Class) but accepts a pre-resolved ClassMeta.
    static RecordReader
    StreamingArrayRecord.reader(TokenReader cursor)
    Wraps a TokenReader as a streaming array-element RecordReader.
    void
    TokenReader.skipChildren()
    Skips over the children of the current structural token.

    static Object
    RestUtils.parseIfJson(String value)
    Parses a string as JSON if it appears to be JSON, otherwise returns the string as-is.
